name: Fate's Whispers
original_name: Fate's Whispers เสียงกระซิบแห่งโชคชะตา
overview: Ice, an unlucky young woman, faces a series of misfortunes and discovers that she can only reverse her bad luck by spending 7 consecutive days with her soulmate (someone born on the same day, month, and year as her). That person is Rada, a fortune teller with special powers!
